# Configuration Reference

<!-- Auto-generated by go generate. Do not edit manually. -->

Bomly reads configuration from three sources (in ascending priority):

1. **Home config** — `~/.bomly/config.yaml`
2. **Project config** — `.bomly/config.yaml` in the project root
3. **Environment variables** — `BOMLY_*`
4. **CLI flags** — highest priority

---

## General

| YAML Key | Environment Variable | Type | Default | Description |
|----------|---------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| `path` | `BOMLY_PATH` | `string` | — | Filesystem path to scan |
| `container` | `BOMLY_CONTAINER` | `string` | — | Container image to scan (e.g. alpine:latest) |
| `url` | `BOMLY_URL` | `string` | — | Remote Git URL to clone and scan |
| `ref` | `BOMLY_REF` | `string` | — | Git ref to checkout when scanning a URL |
| `sbom` | `BOMLY_SBOM` | `bool` | — | Generate SBOM output alongside the scan |
| `audit` | `BOMLY_AUDIT` | `bool` | — | Enable vulnerability auditing |
| `format` | `BOMLY_FORMAT` | `string` | — | Output format: text, json, sarif, spdx, cyclonedx |
| `interactive` | `BOMLY_INTERACTIVE` | `bool` | — | Enable interactive TUI mode |
| `ecosystems` | `BOMLY_ECOSYSTEMS` | `string` | — | Comma-separated list of ecosystems to include |
| `exclude_ecosystems` | `BOMLY_EXCLUDE_ECOSYSTEMS` | `string` | — | Comma-separated list of ecosystems to exclude |
| `detectors` | `BOMLY_DETECTORS` | `string` | — | Comma-separated list of detectors to include |
| `exclude_detectors` | `BOMLY_EXCLUDE_DETECTORS` | `string` | — | Comma-separated list of detectors to exclude |
| `auditors` | `BOMLY_AUDITORS` | `string` | — | Comma-separated list of auditors to include |
| `exclude_auditors` | `BOMLY_EXCLUDE_AUDITORS` | `string` | — | Comma-separated list of auditors to exclude |
| `install_first` | `BOMLY_INSTALL_FIRST` | `bool` | — | Run package manager install before scanning |
| `install_args` | `BOMLY_INSTALL_ARGS` | `[]string` | — | Extra arguments passed to the install command |
| `recursive` | `BOMLY_RECURSIVE` | `bool` | — | Recursively discover subprojects |
| `config` | `BOMLY_CONFIG` | `string` | — | Path to explicit config file |
| `quiet` | `BOMLY_QUIET` | `bool` | — | Suppress all non-error output |
| `verbosity` | `BOMLY_VERBOSE` | `int` | — | Verbosity level (0=normal, 1=verbose, 2+=debug) |

## HTTP / external service settings

| YAML Key | Environment Variable | Type | Default | Description |
|----------|---------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| `http_proxy` | `BOMLY_HTTP_PROXY` | `string` | — | HTTP proxy URL for outbound requests |

## OSV auditor settings

| YAML Key | Environment Variable | Type | Default | Description |
|----------|---------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| `osv_api_base` | `BOMLY_OSV_API_BASE` | `string` | https://api.osv.dev | Base URL for the OSV vulnerability API |
| `osv_cache_dir` | `BOMLY_OSV_CACHE_DIR` | `string` | — | Directory for the OSV response cache |
| `osv_cache_ttl` | `BOMLY_OSV_CACHE_TTL` | `string` | 24h | TTL for cached OSV responses (e.g. 24h) |

## KEV auditor settings

| YAML Key | Environment Variable | Type | Default | Description |
|----------|---------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| `kev_cache_dir` | `BOMLY_KEV_CACHE_DIR` | `string` | — | Directory for the CISA KEV cache |
| `kev_cache_ttl` | `BOMLY_KEV_CACHE_TTL` | `string` | 24h | TTL for cached KEV data (e.g. 24h) |

## Example Configuration

```yaml
# ~/.bomly/config.yaml or .bomly/config.yaml

# General
# Filesystem path to scan
# path: ""
# Container image to scan (e.g. alpine:latest)
# container: ""
# Remote Git URL to clone and scan
# url: ""
# Git ref to checkout when scanning a URL
# ref: ""
# Generate SBOM output alongside the scan
# sbom: false
# Enable vulnerability auditing
# audit: false
# Output format: text, json, sarif, spdx, cyclonedx
# format: ""
# Enable interactive TUI mode
# interactive: false
# Comma-separated list of ecosystems to include
# ecosystems: ""
# Comma-separated list of ecosystems to exclude
# exclude_ecosystems: ""
# Comma-separated list of detectors to include
# detectors: ""
# Comma-separated list of detectors to exclude
# exclude_detectors: ""
# Comma-separated list of auditors to include
# auditors: ""
# Comma-separated list of auditors to exclude
# exclude_auditors: ""
# Run package manager install before scanning
# install_first: false
# Extra arguments passed to the install command
# install_args: []
# Recursively discover subprojects
# recursive: false
# Path to explicit config file
# config: ""
# Suppress all non-error output
# quiet: false
# Verbosity level (0=normal, 1=verbose, 2+=debug)
# verbosity: 0

# HTTP / external service settings
# HTTP proxy URL for outbound requests
# http_proxy: ""

# OSV auditor settings
# Base URL for the OSV vulnerability API
# osv_api_base: https://api.osv.dev
# Directory for the OSV response cache
# osv_cache_dir: ""
# TTL for cached OSV responses (e.g. 24h)
# osv_cache_ttl: 24h

# KEV auditor settings
# Directory for the CISA KEV cache
# kev_cache_dir: ""
# TTL for cached KEV data (e.g. 24h)
# kev_cache_ttl: 24h
```
